findings.title: Automated dependency updates: missing
findings.summary: Asset tier T2: Automated dependency updates is missing. The architectural concern is patch-management maturity — without this signal the team relies on ad-hoc upgrades after the fact. Address by introducing the control at the platform level (CI workflow, repo config, or org policy), not by reacting to individual CVE advisories.

findings.title: Lockfile hygiene: missing
